en_US.hint_model_path: Pick or paste path; size is read automatically
en_US.train_repo_desc: The training repository is bundled with the project and ready to use.
en_US.hint_jsonl_pick: Use the button on the right to pick a file
en_US.data_format_title: Data format example (one JSON object per line):
en_US.data_format_example_line:
{"text": "User: Hello

Assistant: Hi! How can I help?

"}n{"text": "User: Tell a joke

Assistant: Sure...

"}
en_US.hint_output_dir: Pick a folder with the button on the right
en_US.train_hint_footer: Start training runs train.py in the repo with your parameters; logs stream on the Monitor tab.
en_US.monitor_log_placeholder: Training log will appear here in real time…
en_US.export_no_files: No output files yet.n.state.pth weights will appear here after training.
en_US.export_usage_body:
After training, State weights (.state.pth) can be loaded in RWKV inference stacks.
They are stored separately from the original .pth model weights, are very small, and contain only fine-tuned state parameters.
The .pth format avoids confusion; use them together at inference: model.pth + xxx.state.pth
en_US.test_chat_empty: Load a model, then enter a prompt below and send.
en_US.test_prompt_hint: Prompt, e.g. explain advantages of RWKV
en_US.settings_system_intro: Prerequisites for one-click installers on a fresh Windows PC — check in order:
en_US.winget_row_desc: Git / Python / CUDA / MSVC installs rely on winget where applicable.
en_US.winget_missing_intro: May be missing on fresh systems. Install via:
en_US.uv_row_desc: Python venv tool; deps install into project python_venv.
en_US.nvidia_row_desc: GPU training needs a driver before CUDA Toolkit (skip if no NVIDIA GPU).
en_US.cuda_section_desc: RWKV7 training needs CUDA Toolkit (CUDA_HOME should point to the install).nDetected on startup; use Auto detect, one-click install, or pick manually.
en_US.cuda_hint_dir: C:\Program Files\NVIDIA GPU Computing Toolkit\CUDA\v12.x or v13.x
en_US.cuda_log_placeholder: Tap Auto detect to check CUDA
en_US.env_uv_missing_desc: UV will create python_venv; packages go into the project folder, not C:.
en_US.env_deps_intro: The following will install into project python_venv (not C:). Tap Install:n(source: github.com/Joluck/statetuning)
en_US.env_deps_list: UV creates python_venv → installs:ntorch>=2.0.0  [GPU/CUDA, matches CUDA]ntransformers>=4.30.0ntqdm>=4.65.0nhuggingface-hubnninja          [CUDA extension build]
en_US.env_cuda_tools_desc: Training compiles CUDA kernels (rwkv7_state_clampw) live; MSVC C++ is required.nUse the button below to install a lightweight toolchain (~1.5 GB, no IDE):n  • ninja — build system (pip, a few MB)n  • MSVC C++ compiler + Windows SDK (winget)
en_US.env_msvc_desc: Visual Studio Build Tools: compiler + Windows SDK
en_US.env_build_log_placeholder: Tap Install build tools to start…
en_US.snackbar_repo_missing_train: train.py not found under this path.
en_US.snackbar_pick_target_path: Pick or enter a target path first.
en_US.snackbar_train_set_repo: Set the repository path on the Data tab first.
en_US.snackbar_train_no_train_py: train.py not found in the repository.
en_US.snackbar_windows_only_cuda: One-click CUDA install is Windows only.
en_US.snackbar_need_winget_cuda: Install winget (App Installer) first — see Settings.
en_US.snackbar_cuda_installed: CUDA installed — restart the app before training.
en_US.snackbar_pick_cuda_dir: Choose CUDA root (folder that contains bin/nvcc.exe)
en_US.snackbar_windows_only_uv: One-click UV install is Windows only.
en_US.snackbar_windows_only_git: One-click Git install is Windows only.
en_US.snackbar_git_installed: Git installed — you can clone repositories
en_US.snackbar_need_winget_msvc: Install winget first to install MSVC — see Settings.
en_US.snackbar_non_windows_msvc: One-click MSVC is Windows only — configure a compiler manually.
en_US.snackbar_msvc_partial_body: Build Tools registered but cl.exe not on PATH — add C++ workload and restart
en_US.snackbar_msvc_failed: Install failed — install VS Build Tools manually
en_US.snackbar_wait_repo: Wait for repo init or pick a repository path on the Data tab.
en_US.snackbar_env_use_install: Tap Install to set up UV and dependencies
en_US.snackbar_torch_no_cuda: torch has no CUDA — update the NVIDIA driver to the latest
en_US.need_winget_for_install_body: Install App Installer (winget) first to use one-click installs. See Settings.
en_US.snackbar_train_failed_hint: See the Monitor tab for details.
en_US.snackbar_windows_only_python: One-click Python install is Windows only.
en_US.msvc_ready_to_train: MSVC is on PATH; you can start training.
en_US.snackbar_python_installed_body: Python installed — restart the app, then tap Install to add dependencies.
en_US.err_rwkv_root_token: RootIsolateToken unavailable; cannot start RWKV runtime.

en_US.log_cuda_install_done: n✓ CUDA installed. Tap Auto detect to refresh paths, or restart the app.
en_US.log_cuda_install_fail: n✗ Install failed (exit: @code). Try downloading CUDA from NVIDIA manually.
en_US.log_repo_no_train_py: ✗ train.py not found under this path — clone or extract the repository.
en_US.log_git_install_start: ▶ Installing Git via winget...n  UAC may prompt — choose Yesnn
en_US.log_git_install_done: n✓ Git installed. Retry detection or restart the app.
en_US.log_git_install_fail: n✗ Install failed (exit: @code). Download from https://git-scm.com if needed.
en_US.log_train_vcvars_hint: Windows: vcvarsall.bat will initialize MSVC before training.n
en_US.log_train_note_num_steps_yes: Note: num_steps was passed to train.py.
en_US.log_train_note_num_steps_no: Note: this train.py has no num_steps; that UI field was ignored.
en_US.log_train_vcvars_missing: [BUILD] WARNING: vcvarsall.bat not found; starting train.py directlyn
en_US.log_uv_install_start: ▶ Installing UV via winget...n  Package: astral-sh.uvn  UAC may prompt — choose Yesnn
en_US.log_uv_install_done: n✓ UV installed — restart the app.
en_US.log_python_install_start: ▶ Installing Python 3.12 via winget...n  UAC may prompt — choose Yesn  After install, restart this app so Python is detectednn
en_US.log_python_install_done: n✓ Python 3.12 installed.n  Close and reopen the app, then tap Install for dependencies.
en_US.log_python_install_fail: n✗ Install failed (exit: @code). Download from https://www.python.org if needed.
en_US.log_install_restart_tap_install: n→ Restart the app, then tap Install again.n
en_US.log_install_torch_download: Downloading from PyTorch GPU index (~1–2 GB)...n
en_US.log_install_torch_pip_fallback: n  UV torch install failed; falling back to pip...n
en_US.log_install_failed_pkgs: ✗ The following packages failed — see log above:n
en_US.log_buildtools_ready_msg: ✓ ninja is on PATHn✓ MSVC cl.exe is on PATHnBuild tools ready — nothing to install.n
en_US.log_buildtools_ninja_msvc_done: ✓ ninja and MSVC are ready — no further install needed.n
en_US.log_buildtools_ninja_on_path: ▶ ninjan✓ Already on PATH (skipping pip install)nn
en_US.log_buildtools_msvc_found: ✓ MSVC cl.exe detected — nothing to installn  @pathn
en_US.log_buildtools_need_winget: ✗ winget is required to install MSVC — see Settings (App Installer).n
en_US.log_buildtools_non_windows: ✗ Install a C++ toolchain (e.g. gcc/clang) compatible with CUDA.n
en_US.log_buildtools_msvc_install_start: ▶ Installing MSVC C++ via winget...n  Compiler-only payload ~1.5 GB (no IDE)n  UAC may prompt — choose Yesnn
en_US.log_buildtools_msvc_done: n✓ MSVC build tools installed.n  Restart the app before training again.n
en_US.log_buildtools_winget_no_upgrade: n✓ winget: Build Tools already installed; no upgrade (exit code OK).n  Rechecking cl.exe on PATH...n
en_US.log_buildtools_cl_ok: ✓ cl.exe found — CUDA extensions can compilen  @pathn
en_US.log_buildtools_cl_missing: ⚠ cl.exe still not on PATH.n  Open Visual Studio Installer → Modify Build Tools,n  enable “Desktop development with C++” or MSVC v143 + Windows SDK,n  then restart this app or verify with “where cl” in x64 Native Tools.n  Download: https://aka.ms/vs/17/release/vs_buildtools.exen
en_US.log_buildtools_winget_fail: n✗ winget install failed (exit: @code)n  Download VS Build Tools (free, C++ only):n  https://aka.ms/vs/17/release/vs_buildtools.exen  Select MSVC v143 and Windows SDK only.n
en_US.log_env_no_python: ✗ No usable Python foundn  Tap Install to set up UV and create the project venvnn
en_US.log_env_torch_no_cuda: ✗ torch has no CUDA GPU supportn  Update the NVIDIA driver, or use a driver that supports CUDA 13.0n
en_US.snackbar_winget_required: winget (Microsoft Store App Installer) is required first.
en_US.snackbar_windows_only_nvidia: This feature is only supported on Windows.

zh_CN.hint_model_path: 选择或粘贴路径，自动读取模型尺寸
zh_CN.train_repo_desc: 训练仓库已内置在项目中，可直接使用。
zh_CN.hint_jsonl_pick: 点击右侧按钮选择文件
zh_CN.data_format_title: 数据格式示例 (每行一个 JSON):
zh_CN.data_format_example_line:
{"text": "User: 你好

Assistant: 你好！有什么可以帮助你的吗？

"}n{"text": "User: 讲个笑话

Assistant: 好的...

"}
zh_CN.hint_output_dir: 点击右侧按钮选择文件夹
zh_CN.train_hint_footer: 点击「开始训练」会直接在仓库目录运行 train.py 并传入参数，训练日志实时显示在「监控」标签页。
zh_CN.monitor_log_placeholder: 训练日志将在此实时显示…
zh_CN.export_no_files: 暂无输出文件n训练完成后，.state.pth 权重文件将显示在这里
zh_CN.export_usage_body:
训练完成后，State 权重文件 (.state.pth) 可加载到 RWKV 推理框架中。
与原始 .pth 模型权重分开存储，体积极小，只包含经过微调的 state 参数，
pth 格式避免混淆推理时合并使用: model.pth + xxx.state.pth
zh_CN.hint_test_pth: 选择 RWKV 模型文件
zh_CN.test_chat_empty: 加载模型后，在下方输入 prompt 并发送
zh_CN.test_prompt_hint: 输入 prompt，例如：介绍一下 RWKV 的优势
zh_CN.test_log_placeholder: 运行日志将在这里显示
zh_CN.settings_system_base: 系统基础（全新电脑必检）
zh_CN.settings_system_intro: 以下为一键安装的先决条件，全新 Windows 请按顺序检查：
zh_CN.winget_row_desc: Git / Python / CUDA / MSVC 等一键安装均依赖 winget
zh_CN.winget_missing_intro: 全新系统可能未预装，请通过以下方式安装：
zh_CN.winget_ps_hint: 或运行 PowerShell（以管理员身份）：
zh_CN.uv_row_desc: Python 虚拟环境工具，依赖安装到项目 python_venv 目录
zh_CN.nvidia_row_desc: GPU 训练需先装驱动，再装 CUDA Toolkit（无 NVIDIA 显卡可跳过）
zh_CN.nvidia_btn_download: 前往 NVIDIA 官网下载驱动
zh_CN.cuda_section_desc: RWKV7 训练需要 CUDA Toolkit（CUDA_HOME 指向安装目录）。n启动时自动检测，未检测到可点击「一键安装 CUDA」或手动选择。
zh_CN.cuda_hint_dir: C:\Program Files\NVIDIA GPU Computing Toolkit\CUDA\v12.x 或 v13.x
zh_CN.cuda_log_placeholder: 点击「自动检测」检查 CUDA 安装
zh_CN.env_uv_missing_title: 未检测到 UV，依赖将安装到项目目录
zh_CN.env_uv_missing_desc: UV 会创建 python_venv 虚拟环境，依赖装到项目目录，不占用 C 盘。
zh_CN.env_deps_intro: 以下依赖将安装到项目 python_venv 目录（不占 C 盘），点击「一键安装」：n(来源: github.com/Joluck/statetuning)
zh_CN.env_deps_list: UV 创建 python_venv → 安装：ntorch>=2.0.0  [GPU/CUDA，自动匹配 CUDA 版本]ntransformers>=4.30.0ntqdm>=4.65.0nhuggingface-hubnninja          [CUDA 扩展构建]
zh_CN.env_cuda_tools_desc: 训练时需要实时编译 CUDA 内核（rwkv7_state_clampw），必须安装 MSVC C++ 编译器。n点击下方按钮自动安装轻量版编译工具（约 1.5 GB，无 IDE）：n  • ninja  — 构建系统（pip 安装，几 MB）n  • MSVC C++ 编译器 + Windows SDK（通过 winget 安装）
zh_CN.env_ninja_desc: 系统 PATH 或仓库内 python_venv\Scripts\ninja.exe（pip 安装）
zh_CN.env_msvc_desc: Visual Studio Build Tools：C++ 编译器与 Windows SDK
zh_CN.env_build_log_placeholder: 点击「安装编译工具」开始安装…
zh_CN.env_placeholder_install: 点击「一键安装」开始安装…
zh_CN.snackbar_export_missing_run: 未找到 train_loss.jsonl 文件（请先运行训练）
zh_CN.snackbar_pick_model_first: 请先选择 .pth 模型文件
zh_CN.snackbar_pick_tokenizer_first: 请先选择 tokenizer 文件
zh_CN.snackbar_dialog_pick_pth: 选择 RWKV 模型文件 (.pth)

zh_CN.snackbar_train_set_repo: 请先在「数据」标签页设置仓库路径
zh_CN.snackbar_train_no_train_py: 仓库目录下未找到 train.py
zh_CN.snackbar_windows_only_cuda: 一键安装 CUDA 仅支持 Windows
zh_CN.snackbar_need_winget_cuda: 需先安装 winget，详见设置页顶部
zh_CN.snackbar_cuda_installed: CUDA 已安装，请重启应用后开始训练
zh_CN.snackbar_pick_cuda_dir: 选择 CUDA 安装目录（包含 bin/nvcc.exe 的上级目录）

zh_CN.snackbar_uv_installed: UV 已安装，请重启应用

zh_CN.snackbar_msvc_installed: MSVC 已安装，请重启应用后再训练
zh_CN.snackbar_msvc_partial_body: Build Tools 已登记但 cl 未进 PATH，请用安装程序补全 C++ 工作负载后重启

zh_CN.snackbar_torch_no_cuda: torch 未启用 CUDA，请更新 NVIDIA 显卡驱动至最新版本

zh_CN.log_buildtools_cl_missing: ⚠ 仍未在 PATH 中找到 cl.exe。n  请打开「Visual Studio Installer」→ 修改 Build Tools，n  确保勾选「使用 C++ 的桌面开发」或 MSVC v143 + Windows SDK，n  安装完成后重启本应用或从「x64 Native Tools Command Prompt」验证 where cl。n  手动下载： https://aka.ms/vs/17/release/vs_buildtools.exen
zh_CN.log_buildtools_winget_fail: n✗ winget 安装失败 (exit: @code)n  请手动下载 VS Build Tools（免费，仅选 C++ 编译器）：n  https://aka.ms/vs/17/release/vs_buildtools.exen  安装时只勾选 "MSVC v143" 和 "Windows SDK" 两项即可n
zh_CN.log_env_no_python: ✗ 未找到可用 Pythonn  请点击「一键安装」安装 UV 并创建项目虚拟环境nn
zh_CN.log_env_torch_cuda_check: n▶ 检测 torch CUDA 支持...n
zh_CN.log_env_torch_no_cuda: ✗ torch 未检测到 CUDA GPU 支持n  请更新 NVIDIA 显卡驱动至最新版本，或使用支持 CUDA 13.0 的驱动n
zh_CN.snackbar_winget_required: 需要先安装 winget（Microsoft Store App Installer）。

zh_TW.hint_model_path: 選擇或貼上路徑，自動讀取模型尺寸
zh_TW.train_repo_desc: 訓練存放庫已內建於專案中，可直接使用。
zh_TW.data_format_title: 資料格式範例（每行一個 JSON）：
zh_TW.data_format_example_line:
{"text": "User: 你好

Assistant: 你好！有什麼可以幫你？

"}n{"text": "User: 講個笑話

Assistant: 好的...

"}
zh_TW.hint_output_dir: 點右側按鈕選擇資料夾
zh_TW.train_hint_footer: 點「開始訓練」會直接在存放庫目錄執行 train.py 並傳入參數，訓練日誌即時顯示於「監控」分頁。
zh_TW.monitor_log_placeholder: 訓練日誌將即時顯示於此…
zh_TW.export_no_files: 尚無輸出檔案n訓練完成後，.state.pth 權重檔將顯示於此
zh_TW.export_usage_body:
訓練完成後，State 權重檔 (.state.pth) 可載入 RWKV 推理框架。
與原始 .pth 模型權重分開儲存，體積極小，只包含經過微調的 state 參數，
pth 格式避免混淆，推理時合併使用：model.pth + xxx.state.pth
zh_TW.test_chat_empty: 載入模型後，在下方輸入 prompt 並傳送
zh_TW.test_prompt_hint: 輸入 prompt，例如：介紹 RWKV 的優勢
zh_TW.settings_system_base: 系統基礎（全新電腦必檢）
zh_TW.settings_system_intro: 以下為一鍵安裝的先決條件，全新 Windows 請依序檢查：
zh_TW.winget_row_desc: Git / Python / CUDA / MSVC 等一鍵安裝皆依賴 winget
zh_TW.winget_missing_intro: 全新系統可能未預裝，請透過以下方式安裝：
zh_TW.winget_ps_hint: 或以系統管理員執行 PowerShell：
zh_TW.uv_row_desc: Python 虛擬環境工具，依賴安裝至專案 python_venv 目錄
zh_TW.nvidia_row_desc: GPU 訓練需先安裝驅動，再安裝 CUDA Toolkit（無 NVIDIA 顯示卡可略過）
zh_TW.nvidia_btn_download: 前往 NVIDIA 官網下載驅動
zh_TW.cuda_section_desc: RWKV7 訓練需要 CUDA Toolkit（CUDA_HOME 指向安裝目錄）。n啟動時自動偵測；未偵測到可點「一鍵安裝 CUDA」或手動選擇。
zh_TW.cuda_hint_dir: C:\Program Files\NVIDIA GPU Computing Toolkit\CUDA\v12.x 或 v13.x
zh_TW.cuda_log_placeholder: 點「自動偵測」檢查 CUDA 安裝
zh_TW.env_uv_missing_title: 未偵測到 UV，依賴將安裝至專案目錄
zh_TW.env_uv_missing_desc: UV 會建立 python_venv，依賴裝到專案目錄，不佔用 C：。
zh_TW.env_deps_intro: 以下依賴將安裝至專案 python_venv 目錄（不佔 C：），點「一鍵安裝」：n（來源：github.com/Joluck/statetuning）
zh_TW.env_deps_list: UV 建立 python_venv → 安裝：ntorch>=2.0.0  [GPU/CUDA，自動對應 CUDA 版本]ntransformers>=4.30.0ntqdm>=4.65.0nhuggingface-hubnninja          [CUDA 擴充建置]
zh_TW.env_cuda_tools_desc: 訓練時需即時編譯 CUDA 核心（rwkv7_state_clampw），必須安裝 MSVC C++ 編譯器。n點下方按鈕自動安裝輕量工具鏈（約 1.5 GB，無 IDE）：n  • ninja — 建置系統（pip 安裝，數 MB）n  • MSVC C++ 編譯器 + Windows SDK（透過 winget 安裝）
zh_TW.env_ninja_desc: 系統 PATH 或存放庫內 python_venv\Scripts\ninja.exe（pip 安裝）
zh_TW.env_msvc_desc: Visual Studio Build Tools：C++ 編譯器與 Windows SDK
zh_TW.env_build_log_placeholder: 點「安裝編譯工具」開始安裝…
zh_TW.snackbar_export_missing_run: 找不到 train_loss.jsonl（請先執行訓練）
zh_TW.snackbar_repo_missing_train: ✗ 路徑下找不到 train.py，請複製存放庫
zh_TW.snackbar_pick_target_path: 請先選擇或輸入目標路徑
zh_TW.snackbar_train_set_repo: 請先在「資料」分頁設定存放庫路徑
zh_TW.snackbar_train_no_train_py: 存放庫目錄下找不到 train.py
zh_TW.snackbar_windows_only_cuda: 一鍵安裝 CUDA 僅支援 Windows
zh_TW.snackbar_need_winget_cuda: 需先安裝 winget，詳見設定頁頂部
zh_TW.snackbar_cuda_installed: CUDA 已安裝，請重新啟動應用程式後再訓練
zh_TW.snackbar_pick_cuda_dir: 選擇 CUDA 安裝目錄（含 bin/nvcc.exe 的上層目錄）
zh_TW.snackbar_windows_only_uv: 一鍵安裝 UV 僅支援 Windows
zh_TW.snackbar_need_winget_uv: 需先安裝 winget，詳見設定頁頂部
zh_TW.snackbar_uv_installed: UV 已安裝，請重新啟動應用程式
zh_TW.snackbar_windows_only_git: 一鍵安裝 Git 僅支援 Windows
zh_TW.snackbar_git_installed: Git 已安裝，可進行複製操作
zh_TW.snackbar_buildtools_ready_body: ninja 與 MSVC 均已安裝
zh_TW.snackbar_buildtools_msvc_ok: 已偵測到 MSVC，無需重複安裝
zh_TW.snackbar_need_winget_msvc: 需先安裝 winget，詳見設定頁頂部
zh_TW.snackbar_non_windows_msvc: 非 Windows 請自行安裝 C++ 編譯器
zh_TW.snackbar_msvc_installed: MSVC 已安裝，請重新啟動應用程式後再訓練
zh_TW.snackbar_msvc_partial: 需補齊元件或重新啟動
zh_TW.snackbar_msvc_partial_body: Build Tools 已登記但 cl 不在 PATH，請以安裝程式補齊 C++ 工作負載後重新啟動
zh_TW.snackbar_wait_repo: 請等待存放庫初始化完成，或先在資料頁選擇路徑
zh_TW.snackbar_env_use_install: 請點「一鍵安裝」安裝 UV 與依賴
zh_TW.snackbar_torch_no_cuda: torch 未啟用 CUDA，請更新 NVIDIA 顯示卡驅動至最新
zh_TW.dialog_pick_repo: 選擇 statetuning 存放庫資料夾
zh_TW.need_winget_for_install_body: 請先安裝「應用程式安裝程式」以使用一鍵安裝，詳見設定頁頂部
zh_TW.snackbar_model_shape_error: 模型尺寸偵測發生錯誤
zh_TW.snackbar_windows_only_python: 一鍵安裝 Python 僅支援 Windows
zh_TW.snackbar_uv_installed_restart: UV 已安裝，請重新啟動應用程式
zh_TW.msvc_ready_to_train: MSVC 已在 PATH 中，可直接訓練
zh_TW.snackbar_python_installed_body: Python 已安裝，請重新啟動應用程式後點「一鍵安裝」繼續
zh_TW.err_rwkv_root_token: RootIsolateToken 不可用，無法啟動 RWKV runtime。
